title: Replace distorted manager photo with new uploaded image

requirements.text: Replace the distorted manager photo in the Meet the Manager section on the homepage (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) with the newly uploaded image (556973191_25294936933424537_2300403285239686172_n.jpg)

quotes: that picture of me is pretty distorte can you use this picture

acceptanceCriteria: The Meet the Manager section displays the new uploaded photo (556973191_25294936933424537_2300403285239686172_n.jpg) instead of the current distorted 90s.jpg image
The photo is properly sized and positioned within the Meet the Manager section
The image path references the correct file in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The distorted 90s.jpg file is no longer referenced in the Meet the Manager section

constraints: Do not modify the Meet the Manager biography text or phone number
Do not change the layout or styling of the Meet the Manager section beyond the photo replacement
Preserve the existing Meet the Manager section structure
nonGoals: Editing any other sections of the homepage
Modifying other images in the image gallery
Changing the manager's name or contact information
